changelog.message: Build Windows executable in seperate files (not one "portable" exe)

changelog.message: Fix copypaste of local ops into subpatch ops
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix export not working in some cases
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Prevent op-errors when entering directories or files with no permission in file-ports
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Add commandline parameters to control screen/offset to open window
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix bug when selecting aspect ratio of canvas
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix location of extension ops when developing in cables-development setup
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Add usersetting to open popout- and external-canvas in a transparent window (pull request by Uuoocl, thank you!)
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix bug where creation of new op was not possible until new project was re-opened once
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Remove version number from name of executable, always show version number in title
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Do not show intro-tour / hints when started as fullscreen or maximized
changelog.author: stephan
